positive: Minimalist abstract line art of a majestic mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant sunset sky. The mountains should feature sharp, elegant geometric lines and varying levels of complex texture, suggesting deep valleys and peaks. Use a color palette dominated by deep indigo, burnt orange, and warm saffron yellow, with the sky gradients being smooth and luminous. The composition must be centered, with the mountain silhouette taking up the lower two-thirds of the frame. The overall style should be clean vector illustration mixed with watercolor wash textures, emphasizing strong contrast and high legibility for apparel printing. Highly detailed, intricate linework, UHD, graphic novel style, negative space art.
negative: blurry, grainy, low contrast, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifacts, multiple subjects, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, low quality, dirty, messy
